channel.title: kawi.lexi TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kawi.lexi

item.title: Welcome to my 45g protein breakfast every morning lol. Seriously yall I never liked protein powder smoothies but I picked the Dole one up ab a month ago and have been using it religiously. A little bit of chocolate chips helps too but it’s still good with
item.description: Welcome to my 45g protein breakfast every morning lol. Seriously yall I never liked protein powder smoothies but I picked the Dole one up ab a month ago and have been using it religiously. A little bit of chocolate chips helps too but it’s still good with
item.author: kawi.lexi

item.title: Liquid IV is my holy grail when I’m sick. I double down on Vitamin C and do the zicam nose swabs too. I need everyone else’s remedies pls 👇🏼
item.description: Liquid IV is my holy grail when I’m sick. I double down on Vitamin C and do the zicam nose swabs too. I need everyone else’s remedies pls 👇🏼
item.author: kawi.lexi

item.title: He’s so special ❤️🚊 Cardo: Code KAWILEXI for 10% off! Monster Fairings: Code LEXI for discount! Insta 360: Link in bio for discount! NBT: Link in Bio for 15% off! EarPeace: Code LEXI20 for 20% off! Pando moto: Code LEXI for 10% off! #cardofam #insta360 #m

item.title: Oh if it isn’t the domino effect. The red car coming out of the side street was completely blocked, we couldn’t see it. So, no way to prepare for that lol. W Max for the reaction Cardo: Code KAWILEXI for 10% off! Monster Fairings: Code LEXI for discount!
item.description: Oh if it isn’t the domino effect. The red car coming out of the side street was completely blocked, we couldn’t see it. So, no way to prepare for that lol. W Max for the reaction Cardo: Code KAWILEXI for 10% off! Monster Fairings: Code LEXI for discount!
item.author: kawi.lexi

item.title: Adding another pole grip to my collection 🤣 honest rating of this one: 8/10. Superrr sticky when applied but dries out kinda quick. That’s any liquid grip though. Had to reapply a few times but will be using it!! #polegrip #poledancing #pole
item.description: Adding another pole grip to my collection 🤣 honest rating of this one: 8/10. Superrr sticky when applied but dries out kinda quick. That’s any liquid grip though. Had to reapply a few times but will be using it!! #polegrip #poledancing #pole
item.author: kawi.lexi

item.title: My favorite piece out of all of these? I can’t choose 😭😭 I probably won’t wear the body suit by itself but I’ve seen people do it. I’ll be wearing it under my jacket:) The shoes are perfect for meets/casual riding + commuting. And the jeans? 😍 Comment you
item.description: My favorite piece out of all of these? I can’t choose 😭😭 I probably won’t wear the body suit by itself but I’ve seen people do it. I’ll be wearing it under my jacket:) The shoes are perfect for meets/casual riding + commuting. And the jeans? 😍 Comment you

item.title: Just incase you get a little tired while on the highway, the new feature has arrived: the middle lane couch! What’s the weirdest thing you’ve seen on the highway? 😂 FAQ: How do we talk and record audio? I use @cardosystems Packtalk Edge with their app! C

item.title: LEMME DO IT FOR U 😌❤️ 🎧🎤: Cardo code kawilexi 🥋🥋: NBT code kawilexi FAQ: How do we talk, and how do I record my audio? A: I have a Cardo Packtalk Edge! It comes with their in-app intercom recording feature, and is super easy to use! Code KAWILEXI for 10%
item.description: LEMME DO IT FOR U 😌❤️ 🎧🎤: Cardo code kawilexi 🥋🥋: NBT code kawilexi FAQ: How do we talk, and how do I record my audio? A: I have a Cardo Packtalk Edge! It comes with their in-app intercom recording feature, and is super easy to use! Code KAWILEXI for 10%
item.author: kawi.lexi
